title: Talos brings institutional trading tools to Kalshi prediction markets
summary: Talos brings institutional trading tools to Kalshi prediction markets
briefing: The integration provides institutional clients with access to Kalshi’s event contracts and crypto perpetuals via Talos’ existing trading infrastructure.

title: South Korea crypto volumes shrink as retail investors shift to stocks
summary: South Korea crypto volumes shrink as retail investors shift to stocks
briefing: Trading activity on South Korea’s five major crypto exchanges fell sharply as the KOSPI surged, signaling a shift in retail investors toward equities.

title: Foundry asks Bitcoin miners to vote on BIP-110 support
summary: Foundry asks Bitcoin miners to vote on BIP-110 support
briefing: Foundry USA asked its mining customers to signal their support for BIP-110, an actively debated proposal seeking to shrink the amount of data that can be stored in a Bitcoin transaction.

title: SecondFi to wind down after $2.6M ADA theft linked to wallet flaw
summary: SecondFi to wind down after $2.6M ADA theft linked to wallet flaw
briefing: SecondFi will wind down after a $2.6 million ADA theft, while users still await recovery tools that were initially expected within weeks of the exploit.

title: Galaxy pledges $5M for developers quantum-proofing Bitcoin
summary: Galaxy pledges $5M for developers quantum-proofing Bitcoin
briefing: Galaxy pledged up to $5 million in grants for developers working on Bitcoin’s quantum security and elected a council of quantum-advisory experts to research quantum-resistant migration solutions.

title: Bitcoin ETFs extend inflow streak to 6 days with $203M added
summary: Bitcoin ETFs extend inflow streak to 6 days with $203M added
briefing: US spot Bitcoin ETFs extended their inflow streak to six sessions, bringing in about $930 million while remaining down $4.84 billion on a net basis year to date.

title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Here’s what happened in crypto today
briefing: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Balance Coin crashes 99% after reported $915K exploit
summary: Balance Coin crashes 99% after reported $915K exploit
briefing: The attack allowed the exploiter to liquidate multiple Bitcoin-backed vaults before swapping the assets for profit.

title: Jack Dorsey's Block Launches Buzz, a Nostr-Based Slack and GitHub Rival for AI Agents
summary: Jack Dorsey's Block Launches Buzz, a Nostr-Based Slack and GitHub Rival for AI Agents
briefing: The free, open source workspace runs on Nostr, gives AI agents their own cryptographic identities, and challenges Slack and GitHub.

title: DAT Went Wrong: Satsuma to Unwind Bitcoin Treasury, Sell Off $43 Million in BTC
summary: DAT Went Wrong: Satsuma to Unwind Bitcoin Treasury, Sell Off $43 Million in BTC
briefing: The UK Bitcoin treasury company raised $218 million less than a year ago. Now it's returning whatever is left.

title: OpenAI Models Escaped Locked Test Environment, Hacked Hugging Face to Cheat on Benchmark
summary: OpenAI Models Escaped Locked Test Environment, Hacked Hugging Face to Cheat on Benchmark
briefing: OpenAI's own models just broke out of a sandboxed environment, hacked Hugging Face, just to cheat on a cybersecurity evaluation.

title: Pavel Durov Wants to Give a Billion Telegram Users a Crypto Wallet
summary: Pavel Durov Wants to Give a Billion Telegram Users a Crypto Wallet
briefing: The promise of instant, zero-fee crypto transactions for over a billion Telegram users sent its native Gram token up 7%.

title: Google Ships New Gemini Flash Models, But Pro Is Still Missing
summary: Google Ships New Gemini Flash Models, But Pro Is Still Missing
briefing: As Gemini 3.5 Pro stalls in testing limbo, Google ships 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and a restricted cybersecurity model—and quietly teases Gemini 4.

title: Augustus Raises $180 Million to Build a Stablecoin-Ready 'Global Dollar Bank'
summary: Augustus Raises $180 Million to Build a Stablecoin-Ready 'Global Dollar Bank'
briefing: The Tiger Global-led round values the startup at $1 billion as it wires stablecoin rails directly into a federally chartered bank, aiming to modernize the correspondent-banking plumbing behind cross-border payments.

title: Google Is Building an AI Chip Just for Gemini—And Investors Already Moved On It
summary: Google Is Building an AI Chip Just for Gemini—And Investors Already Moved On It
briefing: Codenamed Frozen v2, Google's new server chip would bake part of Gemini's architecture directly into hardware for a projected 6–10x efficiency gain.

title: XRP Breaks Out on Clarity Act Hopes. The Charts Are Still Cautious
summary: XRP Breaks Out on Clarity Act Hopes. The Charts Are Still Cautious
briefing: The Ripple-linked token just had its best day in weeks, as Washington may finally be delivering what the XRP Army has been waiting for.
